metric_caveats: This is the one-shot held-out ExECTv2 fixed test split (40 records); do not tune on these results.
Frozen prompt exect_s0_s1_field_family_v4_10_label_policy — compare to dev validation anchor 92.3% (runs/exect_s0_s1_validation_full_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T221944Z) with full partial-view caveats.
This is not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction (CUI-aware, all annotation families).
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Medication temporality is intentionally excluded from benchmark-facing metrics for this baseline.
Evidence quote support should be reported both overall and split between exact model quotes and ellipsis bridge repairs.
